description: Voice coach prompts for WeChat mini-program. Each key maps to audio file: /assets/audio/{lang}/{key}.mp3

cadence_low.zh: 步频偏低，试试提高每分钟步数到170以上，小步快跑更高效。
cadence_low.en: Cadence is low. Try increasing to over 170 steps per minute. Shorter, quicker strides are more efficient.

cadence_high.zh: 步频偏高，注意避免过度小步，保持自然节奏。
cadence_high.en: Cadence is high. Avoid over-striding with tiny steps. Keep a natural rhythm.

stride_short.zh: 步幅偏短，可能限制了你的速度。尝试在保持步频的同时自然伸展。
stride_short.en: Stride is short, which may limit your speed. Try naturally extending while keeping cadence.

stride_long.zh: 步幅偏长，过度跨步可能增加受伤风险。让脚落在身体正下方。
stride_long.en: Stride is too long. Over-striding increases injury risk. Land with your foot beneath your body.

oscillation_high.zh: 垂直振幅偏高，说明有较多上下弹跳。尝试跑得更平稳，减少垂直方向的能量浪费。
oscillation_high.en: Vertical oscillation is high, meaning you're bouncing too much. Try running smoother to reduce wasted vertical energy.

oscillation_low.zh: 垂直振幅偏低，步态较为经济高效。继续保持平稳的跑姿！
oscillation_low.en: Vertical oscillation is low and efficient. Keep maintaining that smooth form!

gct_long.zh: 触地时间偏长，说明脚在地面停留太久。尝试提高步频，加快脚步转换。
gct_long.en: Ground contact time is long. Your foot stays on the ground too long. Try increasing cadence for quicker turnover.

gct_short.zh: 触地时间偏短，弹性很好！继续保持快速的脚步转换。
gct_short.en: Ground contact time is short and springy. Keep up that fast foot turnover!

knee_lift_low.zh: 膝盖抬起偏低，可能限制了你产生向前的动力。尝试在跑步时有意识地抬膝。
knee_lift_low.en: Knee lift is low, which may limit forward propulsion. Try consciously lifting your knees while running.

arm_swing_narrow.zh: 手臂摆动幅度偏小，适当加大摆臂可以帮助保持平衡和节奏。
arm_swing_narrow.en: Arm swing is narrow. A fuller arm swing helps maintain balance and rhythm.

trunk_lean_forward.zh: 躯干前倾过多，可能造成腰部压力。尝试保持自然挺直，从脚踝处微微前倾。
trunk_lean_forward.en: You're leaning too far forward, which can strain your lower back. Keep a natural upright posture with a slight forward lean from the ankles.

trunk_lean_backward.zh: 躯干后仰会形成刹车效应。尝试从脚踝处微微前倾，利用重力帮助你前进。
trunk_lean_backward.en: Leaning backward creates a braking effect. Try a slight forward lean from the ankles to use gravity.

foot_strike_heel.zh: 检测到脚跟着地模式，可能增加冲击力。尝试用中足或前足着地来缓冲。
foot_strike_heel.en: Heel strike detected, which may increase impact forces. Try landing midfoot or forefoot for better shock absorption.

hip_drop.zh: 检测到髋部下沉，核心力量可能不足。加强臀中肌和核心训练可以改善。
hip_drop.en: Hip drop detected. Core and glute medius strength may need improvement. Try adding hip-strengthening exercises.

shoulder_tension.zh: 肩部紧张，放松肩膀可以帮助你节省能量，让呼吸更顺畅。
shoulder_tension.en: Shoulders look tense. Relaxing them saves energy and helps you breathe more easily.

general_good.zh: 整体跑姿不错！各关键指标都在理想范围内。继续保持！
general_good.en: Your overall running form looks good! Key metrics are within ideal ranges. Keep it up!

general_improve.zh: 存在一些可以优化的地方。关注高优先级的提示，逐步改进你的跑姿。
general_improve.en: There are some areas to improve. Focus on the high-priority tips and gradually refine your form.

welcome_result.zh: 分析完成，来看看你的跑步姿态评估结果吧。
welcome_result.en: Analysis complete. Let's review your running form assessment.

compare_ready.zh: 你可以与精英运动员进行对比，看看差距在哪里。
compare_ready.en: You can compare with elite athletes to see where the gaps are.

coaching_complete.zh: 语音教练播报完毕。你可以随时点击指标查看详细分析和建议。
coaching_complete.en: Voice coaching complete. Tap any metric anytime for detailed analysis and tips.
